name: Ycn School Transportation
officers: Robert Armour (President/Operations Director), Richard Armour (VP), Timothy Armour (Treasurer) - historical; company acquired by National Express Corp 3/24/2012
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (not directly queried); Shields & Company M&A announcement
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under YCN, Y.C.N., or YCN TRANSPORTATION search variants. Y.C.N. Transportation, Inc. was founded 1962 by the Armour family in Norwood, MA, and was acquired by National Express Corporation (NEC/NELLC) on 3/24/2012 along with the Joint Venture of Thompson Transit and YCN Transportation, LLC. Address 19 Vernon St, Norwood remains operational under NELLC. YCN merged operations with JSC Transportation, Inc. (note: JSC Transportation LLC USDOT 2901535 is a different small Yuma AZ freight carrier - NOT the same entity). USDOT may be filed under National Express parent affiliate; direct match could not be confidently identified.
